metadata.description: Comprehensive feature descriptions for PLS-based feature selection
metadata.note: ID and formula columns must be dropped before PLS training

MP_ID.description: Unique identifier from Materials Project database
MP_ID.usage: Drop before training - used only for material identification

auid.usage: Drop before training - used only for material identification

NE.description: Total number of unique chemical elements in the compound
NE.physical_significance: Chemical complexity - affects phonon scattering channels

NA.description: Total number of atoms per unit cell
NA.physical_significance: Determines number of phonon modes (3×NA), affects heat capacity via Dulong-Petit law

V.description: Total volume of the unit cell
V.physical_significance: Unit cell size - affects Brillouin zone dimensions and phonon dispersion

VPA.description: Average volume occupied by each atom in the structure
VPA.physical_significance: Interatomic distance indicator - inversely related to bond strength and phonon frequencies (Θ_D ∝ V_atom^(-1/3))

D.description: Mass per unit volume of the material
D.physical_significance: Inertial mass in phonon frequencies (ω ∝ ρ^(-1/2)), affects sound velocity (v ∝ ρ^(-1/2))

BGAP.description: Energy difference between valence and conduction bands
BGAP.physical_significance: Distinguishes metals (0 eV) from semiconductors/insulators (>0 eV), affects electron-phonon coupling

EPA.description: DFT-calculated total energy normalized by number of atoms
EPA.physical_significance: Ground state electronic energy - relates to bond strength

FEPA.description: Thermodynamic stability relative to elemental reference states
FEPA.physical_significance: Bond strength indicator (negative = stable) - stronger bonds → higher Θ_D

EFMR.physical_significance: Electronic structure indicator - affects screening of ionic interactions

ENPA.description: Thermodynamic enthalpy normalized per atom (AFLOW database)
ENPA.physical_significance: Total energy including PV work term

TM.description: Net magnetic moment per formula unit
TM.physical_significance: Magnetic ordering - spin-lattice coupling can affect phonon lifetimes

MSITE.description: Count of crystallographically distinct magnetic atoms

ASPIN.description: Average magnetic moment per atom (AFLOW database)
ASPIN.physical_significance: Local magnetic moment - affects spin-phonon coupling

BM.description: Resistance to uniform compression, averaged using VRH scheme
BM.physical_significance: Controls longitudinal sound velocity (v_l ∝ √(B/ρ)), related to Debye temperature through acoustic phonon branches

SM.description: Resistance to shear deformation (shape change at constant volume)
SM.physical_significance: Controls transverse sound velocity (v_t ∝ √(G/ρ)), DOMINANT role in Θ_D (SISSO: Θ_D ∝ G^1)

YM.physical_significance: Related to average elastic stiffness, linked to mean sound velocity (SISSO: Θ_D ∝ E^(1/2))

PR.description: Ratio of transverse to axial strain under uniaxial stress (ν = -ε_trans/ε_axial)
PR.physical_significance: Bonding character indicator (covalent: ~0.1-0.25, metallic: ~0.3-0.4), relates to v_l/v_t ratio

PUGR.physical_significance: Brittleness criterion: G/B>0.57 (brittle), G/B<0.57 (ductile); correlates with anharmonicity

ANI.description: Measure of directional variation in elastic properties
ANI.physical_significance: Anisotropy in phonon group velocities - affects thermal conductivity directionality

vs.physical_significance: Related to transverse acoustic phonon group velocity - two degenerate modes

vl.physical_significance: Related to longitudinal acoustic phonon group velocity - one mode

vm.description: Harmonic mean of acoustic velocities: v_m = [1/3(2/v_t³ + 1/v_l³)]^(-1/3)
vm.physical_significance: Directly proportional to Debye temperature in classical theory (Θ_D ∝ v_m)

gruneisen.description: Anharmonicity parameter (γ = -∂lnω/∂lnV) measuring volume dependence of phonon frequencies
gruneisen.physical_significance: Controls thermal expansion (α ∝ γC_v/BV) and thermal conductivity (κ ∝ 1/γ²) - essential for predicting α and κ

DT.description: Characteristic temperature marking transition from quantum to classical lattice behavior (ℏω_max = k_B Θ_D)
DT.physical_significance: PRIMARY TARGET - Maximum phonon frequency cutoff, determines low-T heat capacity (C_v ∝ T³ for T<<Θ_D), thermal conductivity scaling (κ ∝ Θ_D³), and vibrational entropy
DT.calculation_method: DFPT phonon DOS from Materials Project

DT_AGL.description: Debye temperature calculated using Automatic Gibbs Library quasi-harmonic approximation
DT_AGL.physical_significance: PRIMARY TARGET - Same as DT but calculated with QHA including thermal expansion effects
DT_AGL.calculation_method: AGL quasi-harmonic Debye approximation from AFLOW

DT_A_AGL.description: Low-frequency acoustic phonon branch contribution to Debye temperature
DT_A_AGL.physical_significance: Acoustic mode limit, dominates low-T thermal transport
DT_A_AGL.calculation_method: AGL approximation focusing on acoustic branches

Cv_300.description: Lattice vibrational contribution to heat capacity at fixed volume
Cv_300.physical_significance: Related to phonon density of states - approaches Dulong-Petit limit (3N_A k_B) at high T

Cp_300.description: Experimentally accessible heat capacity including anharmonic PV work term
Cp_300.physical_significance: SECONDARY TARGET - C_p = C_v + α²BVT (Nernst-Lindemann relation)

TEX_300.physical_significance: Anharmonic property: α ∝ γC_v/(BV), measures lattice expansion with temperature

TC_300.description: Lattice thermal conductivity via phonon transport
TC_300.physical_significance: SECONDARY TARGET - Phonon heat transport: κ ∝ C_v v_m² τ, Julian-Slack: κ ∝ Θ_D³/(γ²T)

VIB_EN_300.description: Phonon contribution to entropy per atom at 300K
VIB_EN_300.physical_significance: Temperature-dependent disorder from lattice vibrations - S_vib = k_B Σ[ln(1-e^(-ℏω/kT))]

VIB_FE_300.description: Helmholtz free energy contribution from phonons at 300K
VIB_FE_300.physical_significance: F_vib = E_vib - TS_vib, determines temperature-dependent phase stability

preprocessing_steps: 1. Drop identifier columns: MP_ID/auid and formula
2. Check for missing values (impute or remove)
4. Verify units are consistent across databases
5. Optional: Remove outliers (>3σ) for robust training
critical_warnings: ⚠️ MUST DROP 'MP_ID'/'auid' and 'formula' before PLS training
⚠️ Features like vs, vl, vm are derived from BM, SM, D - creates multicollinearity
⚠️ Materials Project and AFLOW have different column names - harmonize before merging

references.anderson_approximation: Anderson, O.L. (1963). J. Phys. Chem. Solids 24(7), 909-917
references.materials_project: Jain, A. et al. (2013). APL Materials 1(1), 011002
references.aflow: Curtarolo, S. et al. (2012). Comp. Mater. Sci. 58, 227-235
references.elastic_constants: Hill, R. (1952). Proc. Phys. Soc. A 65(5), 349
